title: sarcanthus koeteiensis
intro: Sarcanthus koeteiensis, also known as the Koetje's sarcanthus or Koetje's gentian, is a species of flowering plant in the family Gentianaceae, native to tropical Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its potential to support immune function. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, such as reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues, and its extracts have been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments. Herbal preparations of Sarcanthus koeteiensis are often taken in the form of teas, infusions, or capsules, and it is also used in some traditional remedies to support overall well-being.
